rationale: The citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending prior work that jointly models firm/user social content and sales, and the cited paper’s core contribution is an integrated model of traditional/social earned media effects on sales and cross-media dynamics. This is a close conceptual overlap on mechanism and multichannel media-to-sales linkage (not a generic background mention), so it is plausibly substantive. With an exact DOI match (10.1509/jmr.09.0401), this pair should proceed to full relation judgment.
